ogTitle: Cherry Tree Pool vs Chichester: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cherry Tree Pool and Chichester.
heading: Cherry Tree Pool vs Chichester — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cherry Tree Pool, Western Australia and Chichester, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chichester has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Cherry Tree Pool (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cherry Tree Pool or Chichester safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cherry Tree Pool has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Chichester scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cherry Tree Pool scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Chichester scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cherry Tree Pool or Chichester?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chichester has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
